items.name: Holdable Rainbow Dual-Bladed Laser Sword (TOP)
items.description:
Bottom piece: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15554049210

Each dual bladed sword has a top and bottom piece due to UGC limitations. They will join at the hilt seamlessly when equipped.

All colours for single and double bladed swords are available in my Maxxell group or the following link: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=laser&Category=1&CreatorName=Maxxell&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

Holdable swords fit best with block bodies, 90%-100% scaling.

items.name: BALLER ARMY TANK TOP
items.description:
BALLER ARMY TANK TOP TOP TANK UGC by BILLIONSBALLER.

Check out the full collection here 🔥 :
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=3&Subcategory=59&CreatorName=BILLIONS+BALLER&salesTypeFilter=1

Level up your style with the Spike Tank Top — an iconic piece from BILLIONS BALLER.
This premium 3D tank top combines a modern, relaxed fit with gold metallic spikes, delivering a bold, high-end streetwear aesthetic inspired by biker culture and luxury fashion.

Designed for players who want a strong, stylish, and premium appearance, these tank tops fit perfectly on both male and female UGC avatars.
A must-have statement piece to stand out in the Roblox universe.
